subject: [PATCH v2 10/13] nfsd: add netlink upcall for the svc_export cache

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink-based cache upcall support to the NFS daemon (nfsd) for its svc_export cache. It introduces a new multicast event, NFSD_CMD_CACHE_NOTIFY, which notifies userspace of pending requests in the cache. The patch also includes functions to snapshot and update the cache via netlink messages. This change aims to simplify the management of export options by keeping them organized in the netlink headers, reducing the need for synchronization with other parts of the codebase.
